summary: The options include mannitol, methazolamide, clonidine which all have mechanisms that lower eye pressure while dexamethasone has no such mechanism making it unsuitable for reducing intraocular pressure due to its role primarily as an anti-inflammatory rather than affecting ocular fluid dynamics. Agent2 concluded by identifying dexamethasone as the exception among these choices based purely on their effects related specifically to lowering intracranial pressures versus other listed agents with
